title: Purple Tools
description: Turn your diamond tools into something shinier!
body:
![Title](https://i.imgur.com/4NQe7lU.png)

Turns all diamond tools, armor, and items purple while preserving their original details!

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0b2938998ed6f212a550c5923f3b29fc400491f.jpeg)
